title: Deeply saddened by the news of the death of US Senator Lindsey...
title_en: Deeply saddened by the news of the death of US Senator Lindsey...
title_uk: Глибоко засмучений звісткою про смерть сенатора США Ліндсі...
description: Deeply saddened by the news of the death of US Senator Lindsey Graham. Lindsay was a true defender of freedom and the values ​​that make our world a safer place. He visited Ukraine ten times during the years of the full-scale Russian invasion and was here with our people when it was most needed. We were in constant dialogue, which I will miss. Only in the last week we met...
description_en: Deeply saddened by the news of the death of US Senator Lindsey Graham. Lindsay was a true defender of freedom and the values ​​that make our world a safer place. He visited Ukraine ten times during the years of the full-scale Russian invasion and was here with our people when it was most needed. We were in constant dialogue, which I will miss. Only in the last week we met...
description_uk: Глибоко засмучені новиною про смерть сенатора США Ліндсі Грема. Ліндсі був справжнім захисником свободи та цінностей, які роблять наш світ безпечнішим. Він десять разів відвідував Україну за роки повномасштабного вторгнення Росії та був тут, разом із нашими людьми, тоді, коли це було найбільш потрібно. Ми були в постійному діалозі, якого мені бракуватиме. Лише за останній тиждень ми зустрічалися...

title: Explosions reported
title_en: Explosions reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про вибухи
description: That night there was a swing in Crimea as well: after the attack of the BpLA, part of the peninsula was left without light. Explosions were heard at night in Simferopol, Sevastopol and other districts. It is reported that Balaklavskaya and Tavricheskaya TPP could be under attack. The occupying authorities said that they had limited the supply of electricity due to "overloading of networks". Meanwhile, in Dzhankoye and Dzhankoy district, according to the head of Mejlis Refat...
description_en: That night there was a swing in Crimea as well: after the attack of the BpLA, part of the peninsula was left without light. Explosions were heard at night in Simferopol, Sevastopol and other districts. It is reported that Balaklavskaya and Tavricheskaya TPP could be under attack. The occupying authorities said that they had limited the supply of electricity due to "overloading of networks". Meanwhile, in Dzhankoye and Dzhankoy district, according to the head of Mejlis Refat...
description_uk: Этой ночью гойда была и в Крыму: после атаки БпЛА часть полуострова осталась без света Взрывы ночью слышали в Симферополе, Севастополе и других районах. Сообщается, что под ударом могли оказаться Балаклавская и Таврическая ТЭС. Оккупационные власти заявили, что ограничивали подачу электроэнергии из-за «перегрузки сетей». Тем временем в Джанкое и Джанкойском районе, по словам главы Меджлиса Рефата...

title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про постраждалих
description: The former commander of the 155th OMBr, Stanislav Luchanov, was charged with kidnapping and murder of two civilians in the Kyiv region. He himself is in the Northwest Territories. Earlier, the mass media reported that Luchanov, probably because of a domestic conflict, ordered subordinates to deal with two people, after which the military kidnapped two brothers from the village of Kalinovka, took them to the Poltava region and killed them. The bodies of the victims...
description_en: The former commander of the 155th OMBr, Stanislav Luchanov, was charged with kidnapping and murder of two civilians in the Kyiv region. He himself is in the Northwest Territories. Earlier, the mass media reported that Luchanov, probably because of a domestic conflict, ordered subordinates to deal with two people, after which the military kidnapped two brothers from the village of Kalinovka, took them to the Poltava region and killed them. The bodies of the victims...
description_uk: Бывшему командиру 155-й ОМБр Станиславу Лучанову было предъявлено подозрение по делу о похищении и убийстве двух гражданских лиц в Киевской области. Сам он находится в СЗЧ. Ранее СМИ сообщали, что Лучанов, вероятно, из-за бытового конфликта приказал подчинённым расправиться с двумя людьми, после чего военные похитили двух братьев из села Калиновка, вывезли в Полтавскую область и убили. Тела жертв...

title: Kyiv: Update: Zelensky announces accelerated exhumations of Volyn massacre...

description: Update: Zelensky announces accelerated exhumations of Volyn massacre victims. "Exhumation operations will begin in two days in the villages of Ostrivky and Volia Ostrovetska," Zelensky said on July 11, Poland's National Day of Remembrance for victims of the Volyn massacres.
description_en: Update: Zelensky announces accelerated exhumations of Volyn massacre victims. "Exhumation operations will begin in two days in the villages of Ostrivky and Volia Ostrovetska," Zelensky said on July 11, Poland's National Day of Remembrance for victims of the Volyn massacres.
description_uk: Update: Zelensky announces accelerated exhumations of Volyn massacre victims. "Exhumation operations will begin in two days in the villages of Ostrivky and Volia Ostrovetska," Zelensky said on July 11, Poland's National Day of Remembrance for victims of the Volyn massacres.

title: Airstrike attack
title_en: Airstrike attack
title_uk: Авіаційна атака
description: And here are the consequences of yesterday's airstrikes on the Ilsk Refinery in the Krasnodar region of the Russian Federation. Damage to tanks, technical overpasses and the ELOU-AVT-5 installation was recorded on satellite images. It is worth noting that the Ilsk Refinery is one of the largest private oil refining enterprises in the region.
description_en: And here are the consequences of yesterday's airstrikes on the Ilsk Refinery in the Krasnodar region of the Russian Federation. Damage to tanks, technical overpasses and the ELOU-AVT-5 installation was recorded on satellite images. It is worth noting that the Ilsk Refinery is one of the largest private oil refining enterprises in the region.
description_uk: А вот и последствия вчерашних прилетов по Ильскому НПЗ, что в краснодарском крае рф На спутниковых снимках зафиксированы повреждения резервуаров, технических эстакад и установки ЭЛОУ-АВТ-5. Стоит отметить, что Ильский НПЗ - одно из крупнейших частных нефтеперерабатывающих предприятий в регионе.

description: There have just been detailed reports on the situation in the city of Vyshneve - after an explosion in warehouses and a fire caused by the impact of Russian missiles. The Security Service of Ukraine and the Prosecutor General's Office are investigating all the circumstances of the tragedy as part of the criminal proceedings. Today, SBU Major General Poklad reported the first results: who and in which positions in Ukroboronprom admitted, unfortunately, that the warehouses with weapons were in Vyshnevo....
description_en: There have just been detailed reports on the situation in the city of Vyshneve - after an explosion in warehouses and a fire caused by the impact of Russian missiles. The Security Service of Ukraine and the Prosecutor General's Office are investigating all the circumstances of the tragedy as part of the criminal proceedings. Today, SBU Major General Poklad reported the first results: who and in which positions in Ukroboronprom admitted, unfortunately, that the warehouses with weapons were in Vyshnevo....
description_uk: Щойно були детальні доповіді по ситуації у місті Вишневе – після вибуху на складах і пожежі від удару російських ракет. Служба безпеки України та Офіс Генерального прокурора в межах кримінального провадження перевіряють всі обставини трагедії. Сьогодні генерал-майор СБУ Поклад доповів перші результати: хто і на яких посадах в Укроборонпромі допустив, на жаль, що склади зі зброєю були у Вишневому....

Rescuers came to the rescue with unique electric platforms: they accommodate...

Тысячи студентов и преподавателей почти трое суток оставались без электричества, горячей еды и связи, ожидая эвакуации. На помощь прибыли спасатели с уникальными электроплатформами: они вмещают...

description_uk: 💬 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга: "Уночі Росія знову завдала удару по Києву балістичними ракетами. Поранено одинадцять людей, серед них – дитина. Путін робить ставку на балістичний терор. Як йшлося під час наших переговорів із союзниками в Анкарі, головна мета зараз – позбавити Москву цієї останньої переваги. Кроки для цього зрозумілі. Але діяти потрібно зараз, а не пізніше. Ми...
